zh.Benington, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾貝寧頓
zh.Orford, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可奧福德
zh.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Lutegareshale於1100年出生在法國時，他的父親Peter Piers De Valognes52歲，母親Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur48歲。他和Rohese de Vere至少有1個兒子。他去世於1144年9月14日在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Lutegareshale于1100年出生在法国时，他的父亲Peter Piers De Valognes52岁，母亲Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur48岁。他和Rohese de Vere至少有1个儿子。他去世于1144年9月14日在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Lutegareshale was born in 1100, in France, his father, Peter Piers De Valognes, was 52 and his mother, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, was 48. He had at least 1 son with Rohese de Vere. He died on 14 September 1144, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Lutegareshale est né en 1100, à France, son père, Peter Piers De Valognes, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, avait 48 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Rohese de Vere. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1144, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Lutegareshale 1100 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Piers De Valognes 52 und seine Mutter Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur 48. Er hatte mit Rohese de Vere mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 14. September 1144 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Lutegareshale è nato il nel 1100 nel Francia, il suo padre, Peter Piers De Valognes, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, aveva 48 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Rohese de Vere. Morì il 14 settembre 1144, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.New Temple Church, Holborn, Suffolk, Eng: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Benington, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアベニントン
ja.Orford, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクオルフォード

ja.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクミルデンハル
ja.lifeSummary: John De Lutegareshaleが1100年にフランスで生まれた時，父Peter Piers De Valognesは52歳，母Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveurは48歳であった。彼はRohese de Vereとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1144年9月14日にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Lutegareshale(이)가 1100년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Piers De Valognes(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Rohese de Vere(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1144년 9월 14일 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

mn.Benington, Hertfordshire, England: Benington, Heorotfordscír, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Orford, Suffolk, England: Orford, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Lutegareshale nasceu em 1100, em França, seu pai, Peter Piers De Valognes, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tinha 48 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Rohese de Vere. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1144, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Lutegareshale родился в 1100 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Peter Piers De Valognes было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, 48. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Rohese de Vere. Он умер 14 сентября 1144 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Lutegareshale nació en 1100, en Francia, su papá, Peter Piers De Valognes, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Rohese de Vere. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1144, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
